title: Silhouette: Shielded Trading on Hyperliquid Explained
summary_title: Privacy trading on Hyperliquid: aggregating volume to slash fees for all users
summary_description: Silhouette's trusted execution environment lets traders hide activity while pooling volume for fee discounts—even beating centralized exchanges.

key_moments.label: Chandler's background: CeFi expansion, DeFi protocols, then privacy focus
Silhouette defined: shielded exchange on Hyperliquid protecting trade privacy
Beta live with HYPE/USDC pair; prop shops and hedge funds testing
Roadmap: USDH pairs next week, then BTC/ETH majors, then ecosystem tokens
Research drove design: whales wanted privacy, counterparty checks, lower fees
How it works: trusted execution environment, agent wallets, no fund custody
Hyperliquid decoupling from crypto via TradFi markets and 24/7 trading
Launching fee module, staking discounts; claiming cheapest fees vs CeFi

pull_quote: You can mimic 24 seven with different markets across the globe, but there hasn't been one truly global market that unifies all these disparate parts.
